strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, low-latency systems, and infrastructure — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Active hands-on AI-agent and MCP framework work at current role demonstrates early, practical adoption of agentic tooling and workflows
Founder of GISCollective and author of multiple open-source libraries — sustained entrepreneurial execution and public technical contribution
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a closely related technical field; holds two Bachelor's degrees (CS and Fine Arts/Imaging)
AI involvement is recent, operational, and contributory — no evidence of strategic AI leadership, recognized AI thought leadership, or AI products built and shipped at scale
All career titles are Senior/Staff Developer; no demonstrated director-level scope, strategic customer advisory experience, or cross-organizational influence at the level the role requires
response.justification: Bogdan has genuine engineering breadth and his current work on MCP frameworks and agentic tooling is directionally relevant, but this role is a Director-level IC position requiring recognized AI thought leadership, the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers, and influence over cloud and AI product direction at scale. His AI experience is both recent and contributor-level rather than strategic, his academic background does not include an advanced AI-adjacent degree, and his entire career trajectory reflects a strong individual craftsman rather than the senior technical strategist and external-facing advisor this position demands. The gap is too substantial for the interview process to bridge.
